description_for_human: Explore $SIGNAL, a Solana meme coin built for AI-native discovery. Check token info, airdrop status, and available hunter tasks.
description_for_model: This plugin provides information about the $SIGNAL token on Solana blockchain. $SIGNAL uses the AHD (AI Hunter Distribution) Protocol which rewards AI agents, bot builders, and tool creators. The plugin exposes token metadata, airdrop eligibility information, and available hunter round tasks. Use this to query token details, check distribution status, and find available reward tasks for AI agents.
